summary_en: 3,000,000 shares (3.08% of shares outstanding) up to ¥27.5B. Execution window: May 18 – December 30, 2026. Method not disclosed. Rationale: flexible capital policy amid FY3/27 and FY3/28 business environment and financial position.
title_en: Notice Regarding Determination of Matters Relating to Acquisition of Treasury Shares (Acquisition of treasury shares under the provisions of the Articles of Incorporation based on the Company Law Article 165, Paragraph 2)
translation_en_brief: On May 15, 2026, the board of Toyo Suisan Kaisha resolved to authorize the acquisition of treasury shares under Company Law Article 156 (as applied via Article 165, Paragraph 3). The board approved an acquisition program with an upper limit of 3,000,000 shares (3.08% of shares outstanding excluding treasury stock) and a maximum expenditure of ¥27.5 billion. The acquisition period runs from May 18 through December 30, 2026. The stated rationale is to implement flexible capital policy while considering the business environment and financial position across fiscal years ending March 2027 and March 2028. At March 31, 2026, the company held 13,489,660 treasury shares against 97,391,384 shares outstanding (excluding treasury stock).
